titleStmt.title: SII 24.406: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 406. (A.R. No. 313 of 1950-51.) PRĀKĀRA, TIERS OF THE ARJUNA-MAṆḌAPA FACING THE EAST WALL. OF THE ŚĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, EAST SIDE

summary.p: Registers two endowments of 80 and 40 poṉ respectively, the former for special service on the occasion of the sacred bath of the god in the Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷaṉ-tirumaṇḍapam and the latter for the viḍāyāṟṟi (recreation) of the god on the day following the pushpayāgam in the Viruppaṇṇa-uḍaiyār-tirunāḷ in the month of Chittirai, the expenses towards which were to be met out of the interest accruing on the endowed amounts, by Kandāḍai Rāmānujayyaṅgār, the disciple of Kandāḍai Mādhavayyaṅgār. The year of the grant is expressed by the Śaka year 1454, Nandana as well as the chronogram Bhūmivandyē and details of the date viz Ṛishabha ba. 11, Wednesday, Uttiraṭṭādi regularly correspond to 1532 A.D., May 1, ·12, ·21

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīman mahārājāthirājan rājaparameśvaran śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraaccyuta devamahārāyar prithivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 4- l mel cellāniṉṟa nandanasamvatsarattu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu budhavāramum peṟṟa Uttira nakṣatrattu nāḷ tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati mutalāṉa Irāmānja kūṭaṅkaḷ dharmmattukku karttarāna kantāṭai mādhavayaṅkār [ kan=tā] ṭai rāmānujayaṅkārukku poli Ūṭṭu śilāsādhanam paṇṇikkuṭutta paṭi tammuṭaiya Ubhaiyam Āka perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevaṟku varuṣamtoṟum paṉṉiraṇṭu ppukkum Aḻakiya maṇavāḷaṉ tirumaṇṭapattile Eṟi Aruḷi tirumañcaṉam koṇṭaruḷa ciṟappukkaṭṭaḷaikku Amutu ceytu Aruḷa poli Ūṭṭu Āka śrīpaṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa ḷe 8 10 � māsam Oṉṟukku ṉūṟṟukku Iraṇṭu paṇam viḻukkāṭu vaṭṭikkuk kūṭṭiṉa ḷe ka ceytu Aruḷum māsam Oṉṟukku pori Amutu 4 100-kku U 3 10 U Atirasam 100-kku U 3ý vaṭai U 2ý sukhiyaṉ 100-kku U 2 ý can=tanam paṭi Irupatukku U 1 � Aṭaikkāy Amutu
2 1000-� U 1ý Ilai Amutu 1000 5 100-kku U �ý tirukkuttumaṇiviḷakkukkum tiruvantikkāppukkum ney Amutu 2ḷa-kku U 10 ý campāttāḷikai 2-kku U 2 Āka ḷe 1 U 6ý cittiraimāsam viruppaṇauṭaiyār tiruṉāḷ puṣpayāgam Āṉa maṟṟai nāḷ viṭāy Āṟṟikku teṟkukkaraiyil kan=tāṭai rāmānujayaṅkār toppukku Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷaikku poli Ūṭṭu Āka śrī paṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa ḷe 4 10-� māsam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭikku ṉūṟṟukku Iraṇṭu paṇam viḻukkāṭu varuṣam Oṉṟukkuk kūṭṭiṉa ḷe t U 6-kku Amutu ceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷai pori Amutu 6 100-kku U 6ý Atirasam 3 100-kku U tvaṭai 3 100-u 6ý sukhiyan 3 100-kkuu 6ý veccamutu kūṉ 3 10-kku U 9ý pāṉakakkūṉ 3 10-kku U 6ý kalasokaram vakai Uḷuntu Okaram taḷikai 6ý puḷi Okaram taḷikai 6ý kaṭuku karam taḷikai 6ý daddhyodaram taḷikai 6 Āka taḷikai 2 10 4-ý ḷe3 Akkāravaṭical taḷikai ka Āka taḷikai 2 10 5-kku ḷa 3 U 8ý cantanam
paṭi [2 10]kku U 2ý Aṭaikkāy Amutu 2 1000-kku U 1ý Ilai Amutu 1000 5 100-kku U 10ý vanti kum tirumaṇik kuttuviḷakkukkum ney 2ḷavukku U 10ý parivaṭṭa vukku ḷe 1 U 2 Ākaḷe 1 U 6 Āka vakai Iraṇṭukku ḷe 12 10 Inta poṉ ṉūṟṟu Irupatum śrī paṇṭārattile mutal vaittuk koṇṭapaṭiyile vaṭṭikkuc cilavāka Inta Ubhaiyam Iraṇṭukkum Amutupaṭi campāvum ney Amutu kaṟi Amutu Uṭpaṭṭa vakai śrī paṇṭārattile viṭṭu candrādityavaraiyum Ācandrārkkasthāyi Āka koṇṭaruḷakkaṭavatu Ākavum poli Ūṭṭu viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu pattil Oṉṟum rāmānujak kūṭṭattile Aṉubhavittuk koḷḷakkaṭavār Ākavum § bhūmiva ndyāRead mvandye śakasyābde bhūṣṇau nandanahāyane . vṛṣabhārkkesite pakṣa Ekādaśyām budhottare . 1 mādhavāryyasya saphśiṣyassarvadharmma dhurandharaḥ . kandāḷapadasamyukta rāmānujapadāhvayaḥ . 2 bhaktyā śrī raṅganāthasya bahudraviṇadānataḥ . saṅkrān=tiṣu . dvādaśa makalpayat . 3
ṣpotsava ñcitran=tathā caitrotsavādanu . śramāpanayanannāma sīmārāmekaronyudā . 4 Avyādavyāja kāruṇyapūritāyatalocanaḥ śrīraṅganāyaka śrī madrāmānujamaharnniśam . 5
Digital edition of SII 24.406 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
